text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0
font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0
font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0
font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0
font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0
font-family:'Inter','Noto Sans SC','Helvetica Neue',sans-serif;font-size:13px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:600;opacity:1.0
font-family:'Inter','Noto Sans SC','Helvetica Neue',sans-serif;font-size:13px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:600;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 每个 bit 用 6 个晶体管 (6T SRAM cell):

text.style: font-family:'Inter','Noto Sans SC','Helvetica Neue',sans-serif;font-size:13px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:600;opacity:1.0
font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: - 不需要刷新, 只要供电就保持数据

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0
font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: - 面积大 (6T → 每 bit 很占面积)

text.style: font-family:'Inter','Noto Sans SC','Helvetica Neue',sans-serif;font-size:13px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:600;opacity:1.0

svg.text: - 功耗: 静态漏电 + 读写功耗

text.style: font-family:'Inter','Noto Sans SC','Helvetica Neue',sans-serif;font-size:13px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:600;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 用于: Register File, L1/L2 Cache, Shared Memory

text.style: font-family:'Inter','Noto Sans SC','Helvetica Neue',sans-serif;font-size:13px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:600;opacity:1.0
font-family:'Inter','Noto Sans SC','Helvetica Neue',sans-serif;font-size:13px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:600;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 每个 bit 只用 1 个晶体管 + 1 个电容:

text.style: font-family:'Inter','Noto Sans SC','Helvetica Neue',sans-serif;font-size:13px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:600;opacity:1.0
font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: - 电容会漏电 → 必须定期刷新 (Refresh, 每 ~64ms)

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: - 读是破坏性的 (读出电荷后需要写回)

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: - 面积小 (1T1C → 每 bit 面积是 SRAM 的 1/4-1/6)

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: - 读写慢 (~数十 ns), 但带宽可以做高 (宽总线)

text.style: font-family:'Inter','Noto Sans SC','Helvetica Neue',sans-serif;font-size:13px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:600;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 用于: GPU 显存 (HBM), CPU 主存 (DDR)

text.style: font-family:'Inter','Noto Sans SC','Helvetica Neue',sans-serif;font-size:13px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:600;opacity:1.0
font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0
font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0
font-family:'Inter','Noto Sans SC','Helvetica Neue',sans-serif;font-size:13px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:600;opacity:1.0
font-family:'Inter','Noto Sans SC','Helvetica Neue',sans-serif;font-size:13px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:600;opacity:1.0
font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0
font-family:'Inter','Noto Sans SC','Helvetica Neue',sans-serif;font-size:13px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:600;opacity:1.0
font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: Row Buffer (Sense Amplifier) ← 当前打开的行的缓存

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: [col0][col1]...[colN] 读写都在 Row Buffer 上操作

text.style: font-family:'Inter','Noto Sans SC','Helvetica Neue',sans-serif;font-size:13px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:600;opacity:1.0
font-family:'Inter','Noto Sans SC','Helvetica Neue',sans-serif;font-size:13px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:600;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 1. ACTIVATE: 打开一行 (将 Row 的数据读入 Row Buffer) ~13ns (tRCD)

text.style: font-family:'Inter','Noto Sans SC','Helvetica Neue',sans-serif;font-size:13px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:600;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 2. READ/WRITE: 从 Row Buffer 读/写特定列 ~13ns (CL)

text.style: font-family:'Inter','Noto Sans SC','Helvetica Neue',sans-serif;font-size:13px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:600;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 3. PRECHARGE: 关闭当前行 (准备打开下一行) ~13ns (tRP)

text.style: font-family:'Inter','Noto Sans SC','Helvetica Neue',sans-serif;font-size:13px;fill:#cdd6f4;font-weight:600;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 如果连续访问同一行 (Row Buffer Hit): 只需 READ ~13ns

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6adc8;font-weight:normal;opacity:1.0

svg.text: 如果访问不同行 (Row Buffer Conflict): PRECHARGE + ACTIVATE + READ ~40ns

text.style: font-family:'Cascadia Code','Fira Code','JetBrains Mono','Menlo','Consolas','Noto Sans Mono CJK SC',monospace;font-size:12.5px;fill:#a6e3a1;font-weight:600;opacity:1.0

svg.text: → 这就是 "Row Conflict" 延迟的来源
